caption:
Anthropic's Claude is capturing the attention of paid AI consumers, outpacing ChatGPT in specific segments. Data shows a significant 75% increase in Claude's paying consumers since January 2026. 📈🤖

Is this the beginning of a shift in the AI landscape?

Sources: TechCrunch, Indagari, DataCamp
#AI #Anthropic #Claude #ChatGPT #TechNews #DataTrends #ConsumerInsights #AIAdoption

story.title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
